summary: Video. A nearly 8-minute 2019 ICE walkthrough of the South Texas Family Residential Center. It shows a child walking the campus path, a clothing area stocked with jeans (Boys Y14/Y16), children coloring with crayons, a cafeteria steam-table with rice and pinto beans labeled in English and Spanish, and a library. The facility includes medical, educational, recreational, and dining areas. The audio music score is low (0.22). It is a slow institutional B-roll facility tour.
notable_text: Pinto Beans / Frijoles Pintos. BOYS Y14 & Y16. (banner partially reading 'familia').
